# `openai_file_search_callout`

Executes pending file search calls against an OGX vector store API.

## Configuration Notes

First-pass requests remain unchanged until core continuation support can re-enter the request phase with pending file-search calls. Re-entered streaming requests are rejected because citation markers require an incremental SSE transformer.

## Configuration

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `allow_insecure_auth_over_http` | bool | no | Permit credentials to be sent over plaintext HTTP. This is intended only for explicitly trusted local development endpoints. Production authenticated endpoints must use HTTPS. |
| `allow_private_url` | bool | no | Allow URLs that target local-sensitive addresses. DNS names are rejected unless this is enabled because validation cannot pin the address that the HTTP client will eventually dial. |
| `annotation_template` | string | no | Per-result formatting template. |
| `api_key` | string (secret) | no | Optional Bearer credential (supports `${ENV_VAR}`). Wrapped in [`SecretString`] to prevent accidental logging. |
| `auth_type` | `bearer` \| `none` | no | Authentication method. When omitted, a configured key selects `bearer`; otherwise authentication defaults to `none`. |
| `context_template` | string | no | Model-facing search context template. |
| `max_response_bytes` | integer | no | Maximum response body size in bytes per callout. |
| `max_total_response_bytes` | integer | no | Maximum cumulative successful response bytes per filter execution. |
| `on_error` | `ignore` \| `reject` | no | Behaviour when a vector-store callout fails. Named `on_error` because `parse_filter_config` strips `failure_mode` as a pipeline-structural key. |
| `search_template` | string | no | Query formatting template. |
| `timeout_ms` | integer | no | Whole-call timeout in milliseconds. |
| `vector_store_url` | string | yes | Base URL for the OGX vector store API. |
